_meta.note: Format: {topic, text_en, text_hi, salary_anchor, company_anchor}. Use djb2(topic) % length to pick deterministically.

stakes.text_en: If you can't explain Kafka partition leadership failover, you'll never pass Amazon's distributed systems round.
stakes.text_hi: Agar Kafka partition leadership failover explain nahi kar sakta, Amazon ka distributed systems round kabhi pass nahi hoga.

stakes.text_en: Kafka consumer group rebalancing: get it wrong, your Flipkart SDE-2 offer disappears.
stakes.text_hi: Kafka consumer group rebalancing galat karo, Flipkart SDE-2 offer chala jaata hai.

stakes.text_en: Not knowing exactly-once semantics costs engineers the Confluent and Razorpay senior roles every quarter.
stakes.text_hi: Exactly-once semantics nahi jaanna Confluent aur Razorpay ke senior roles har quarter engineers se cheen leta hai.

stakes.text_en: Redis eviction policy confusion is a direct ₹30LPA tax on your earning potential.
stakes.text_hi: Redis eviction policy confusion seedha ₹30LPA ka tax hai teri earning potential pe.

stakes.text_en: If you don't know Redis cluster sharding, you'll never make Senior at any funded startup.
stakes.text_hi: Agar Redis cluster sharding nahi jaanta, kisi bhi funded startup mein Senior nahi banega.

stakes.text_en: Redis persistence modes: picking wrong in a Swiggy interview means starting the loop again.
stakes.text_hi: Redis persistence modes: Swiggy interview mein galat choose karna matlab loop phir se shuru.

stakes.text_en: Engineers who can't design for scale are permanently capped at ₹20LPA. This is the unlock.
stakes.text_hi: Jo engineers scale ke liye design nahi kar sakte woh permanently ₹20LPA pe cap hain. Yeh unlock hai.

stakes.text_en: Not knowing consistent hashing is why your Google L5 interview ended in the first 20 minutes.
stakes.text_hi: Consistent hashing nahi jaanna isliye Google L5 interview pehle 20 minutes mein khatam ho gaya.

stakes.text_en: The senior SDE who skips the non-functional requirements step will fail every FAANG design round. Every time.
stakes.text_hi: Senior SDE jo non-functional requirements step skip karta hai woh har FAANG design round fail karega.

stakes.text_en: You cannot become a Principal Engineer without knowing database partitioning cold. This is that session.
stakes.text_hi: Database partitioning jaane bina Principal Engineer nahi ban sakte. Yahi session hai.

stakes.text_en: Java memory model confusion will get you an on-the-spot rejection at every serious Java role.
stakes.text_hi: Java memory model confusion se har serious Java role pe on-the-spot rejection hogi.

stakes.text_en: Not knowing the difference between ClassLoader hierarchy types caps you at junior forever.
stakes.text_hi: ClassLoader hierarchy types ka farak nahi jaanna tujhe junior pe hamesha ke liye cap kar deta hai.

stakes.text_en: Engineers who can't explain service mesh get rejected at Razorpay, Meesho, and CRED every batch.
stakes.text_hi: Service mesh explain nahi kar paane wale engineers Razorpay, Meesho, CRED se har batch mein reject hote hain.

stakes.text_en: Monolith decomposition patterns: not knowing these is why you're still at a service company.
stakes.text_hi: Monolith decomposition patterns nahi jaanna isliye abhi bhi service company mein ho.

stakes.text_en: Docker security best practices: skipping them is how you fail the DevOps round at any unicorn.
stakes.text_hi: Docker security best practices skip karna unicorn ke DevOps round fail karne ka tarika hai.

stakes.text_en: Not knowing Kubernetes resource management means the SRE offer stays at ₹40LPA, never above.
stakes.text_hi: Kubernetes resource management nahi jaanna matlab SRE offer ₹40LPA pe rukha rahega, upar nahi jaega.

stakes.text_en: Query optimization blind spots will lose you the Zomato backend role to someone who costs 30% less.
stakes.text_hi: Query optimization blind spots teri wajah se Zomato backend role uss banda ko milega jo 30% sasta hai.

stakes.text_en: Index ignorance is the fastest way to stay at junior level in any data-heavy company.
stakes.text_hi: Index ignorance kisi bhi data-heavy company mein junior level pe rehne ka sabse fast tarika hai.

stakes.text_en: Cache invalidation confusion is why PhonePe SDE-2 candidates get 'not moving forward' emails.
stakes.text_hi: Cache invalidation confusion isliye PhonePe SDE-2 candidates ko 'not moving forward' emails aate hain.

stakes.text_en: Thundering herd problem: not knowing this costs you the Meesho system design offer.
stakes.text_hi: Thundering herd problem nahi jaanna Meesho system design offer le jaata hai tujhse.

stakes.text_en: CAP theorem application, not just theory: this gap costs engineers the SDE-3 title indefinitely.
stakes.text_hi: CAP theorem application, sirf theory nahi: yeh gap engineers se SDE-3 title indefinitely cheen leta hai.

stakes.text_en: Distributed consensus confusion guarantees rejection at every senior infra and platform role.
stakes.text_hi: Distributed consensus confusion har senior infra aur platform role pe rejection guarantee karta hai.

stakes.text_en: Thread safety confusion is a direct ₹20LPA tax every senior engineering position charges.
stakes.text_hi: Thread safety confusion seedha ₹20LPA tax hai jo har senior engineering position leta hai.

stakes.text_en: Not understanding happens-before relationships means Java concurrency interview = automatic no-hire.
stakes.text_hi: Happens-before relationships samjhe bina Java concurrency interview = automatic no-hire.

stakes.text_en: Choosing the wrong load balancing algorithm fails the Flipkart SRE system design in under 10 minutes.
stakes.text_hi: Galat load balancing algorithm choose karna Flipkart SRE system design 10 minutes mein fail karaata hai.

stakes.text_en: Solving LeetCode randomly without pattern recognition caps you at 300 LeetCode problems solved and 0 offers.
stakes.text_hi: Pattern recognition ke bina randomly LeetCode solve karne se 300 problems aur 0 offers milte hain.

stakes.text_en: Not knowing which DP pattern applies costs you the SDE-2 offer at Amazon every time.
stakes.text_hi: Kaunsa DP pattern apply hoga nahi jaanna Amazon SDE-2 offer har baar cheen leta hai.

stakes.text_en: HTTP/2 multiplexing vs HTTP/1.1: picking wrong drops you from SDE-2 to SDE-1 offer immediately.
stakes.text_hi: HTTP/2 multiplexing vs HTTP/1.1: galat choose karna immediately SDE-2 se SDE-1 offer kara deta hai.

stakes.text_en: Process vs thread confusion is the interview mistake that caps careers at junior permanently.
stakes.text_hi: Process vs thread confusion woh interview galti hai jo careers ko permanently junior pe cap kar deti hai.

stakes.text_en: Low-level design round: failing the SOLID principles question is an immediate reject at Swiggy, Zomato, and CRED.
stakes.text_hi: Low-level design round: SOLID principles question fail karna Swiggy, Zomato, CRED pe immediate reject hai.

stakes.text_en: Idempotency in REST APIs: not knowing this costs you the Razorpay backend role. Every application cycle.
stakes.text_hi: REST APIs mein idempotency: yeh nahi jaanna har application cycle mein Razorpay backend role lete hai tujhse.

stakes.text_en: CDN origin pull vs push strategies: wrong answer fails the infrastructure design round at Hotstar.
stakes.text_hi: CDN origin pull vs push strategies: galat answer Hotstar pe infrastructure design round fail karaata hai.

stakes.text_en: Spring bean lifecycle: if you can't trace it end-to-end, the TCS Digital and Wipro Premium reject is coming.
stakes.text_hi: Spring bean lifecycle: end-to-end trace nahi kar sakta toh TCS Digital aur Wipro Premium reject aa raha hai.

stakes.text_en: RabbitMQ dead letter queues: skipping this concept in an interview signals 'junior mindset' immediately.
stakes.text_hi: RabbitMQ dead letter queues: interview mein yeh concept skip karna immediately 'junior mindset' signal karta hai.

stakes.text_en: gRPC vs REST: choosing wrong in a microservices design interview loses you ₹15LPA in negotiation power.
stakes.text_hi: gRPC vs REST: microservices design interview mein galat choose karna ₹15LPA negotiation power kho deta hai.

stakes.text_en: JWT token storage: the wrong answer here is a security red flag that ends Razorpay interviews instantly.
stakes.text_hi: JWT token storage: yahan galat answer ek security red flag hai jo Razorpay interviews instantly khatam karta hai.

stakes.text_en: If you don't know this, you'll never make Senior. This is the knowledge gate.
stakes.text_hi: Agar yeh nahi jaanta, kabhi Senior nahi banega. Yeh woh knowledge gate hai.

stakes.text_en: Every engineer who reaches ₹60LPA+ knew this concept before their critical interview.
stakes.text_hi: ₹60LPA+ tak pahunchne wala har engineer apne critical interview se pehle yeh concept jaanta tha.

stakes.text_en: The SDE-3 who out-earns you by ₹30LPA answered this question better. Not smarter — just better prepared.
stakes.text_hi: Jo SDE-3 tujhse ₹30LPA zyaada kamaata hai usne yeh question better answer kiya. Smarter nahi — sirf better prepared.

stakes.text_en: Six months of grinding LeetCode means nothing if this system design gap exists.
stakes.text_hi: 6 mahine LeetCode grind karna kuch nahi karta agar yeh system design gap exist karta hai.
